description_long: This helicopter features a sleek, modern design with a dark, metallic red and black color scheme, giving it a tactical and futuristic appearance. The main body is compact, with two large, circular main rotors mounted on either side, each protected by a ring structure. The tail section is elongated and ends in a vertical stabilizer, adorned with a white skull insignia and stylized text. The undercarriage is equipped with robust landing skids and visible weapon mounts, suggesting a military or law enforcement role. The cockpit is streamlined, with angular windows that appear tinted and reinforced. Additional details include external sensors, antennas, and missile pods, enhancing its high-tech, aggressive look.
description: A futuristic, dark red and black helicopter with dual ringed rotors, a streamlined cockpit, and visible weapon mounts, featuring a skull insignia on the tail.
description_view_0: Front view shows the dual ringed rotors, angular cockpit, and weapon mounts beneath the body.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the elongated tail with skull insignia, missile pods, and the circular rotor structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the tail stabilizer, both ringed rotors, and the symmetry of the landing skids.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the tail insignia, cockpit profile, and weaponry.
attribute_rotor_blades: Two main rotors, each with four straight, wide blades made of dark metallic material, encased in protective rings; blades are dark red with no visible markings.
attribute_tail_rotor: Not visible; the tail section ends in a vertical stabilizer with no exposed tail rotor.
attribute_landing_skids: Two robust, straight landing skids made of black metal, with crossbars for support and reinforced footpads.
attribute_cockpit_windows: Three angular, tinted cockpit windows at the front, framed in black, with no visible markings.
